confirm.delete-desc: This removes the selected item from clipboard history.
confirm.clear-desc: Choose whether pinned items should be kept.
confirm.clear-desc-no-pinned: This removes every entry from clipboard history.
confirm.clear-desc-all-pinned: Every entry is pinned. Use Clear everything to remove them all.

empty.history-message: No entries in the clipboard history.
empty.no-matches-message: No entries match the current filter.

setup-wizard.footer-note: You can change these later in settings.
setup-wizard.subtitle: A few quick choices to get you started.
setup-wizard.title: Welcome to Noctalia

errors.parse-ip-geolocation: Could not parse IP geolocation response

screen-time.disabled: Screen time tracking is off. Enable it in Settings to record per-app usage.
screen-time.empty: No app usage recorded yet. Focus a window to start tracking.

network.unavailable-detail: Install and enable NetworkManager to manage networks from here.

bluetooth.rfkill-blocked: Bluetooth is blocked by the system. Turn it on to clear the block.
bluetooth.no-devices: No devices found. Start scanning to discover nearby Bluetooth devices.

pairing-detail.confirm: Confirm that this code matches the one shown on the device:
pairing-detail.display-pin: Enter this PIN on the device:
pairing-detail.display-passkey: Enter this code on the device:
pairing-detail.pin-code: Enter the PIN shown on the device:
pairing-detail.passkey: Enter the passkey shown on the device:

media.start-playback: Start playback in an MPRIS app

audio.no-output-devices-body: No playback sinks are currently available.
audio.no-input-devices-body: No recording sources are currently available.
audio.no-application-audio-body: No application playback streams are currently available.

lockscreen.ready: Type your password and press Enter.

errors.logout-body: Could not determine how to terminate this session.
errors.reboot-body: Could not launch a reboot command.
errors.shutdown-body: Could not launch a shutdown command.
errors.lock-body: The session lock protocol is not available.

internal.keybind-invalid-super: The Super/Windows key cannot be used in shell keybinds.
internal.keybind-invalid-printable: Printable keys (letters, numbers, symbols) require a modifier such as Ctrl or Alt.
internal.keybind-invalid-modifier: This shortcut accepts a single key without modifiers.

window.title: Settings
window.no-results-hint: Try a different setting name or config key.

export-config.title: Export Config
export-config.merged-user-description: Combines config files and GUI overrides into one TOML file. Built-in defaults stay implicit.
export-config.full-effective-description: Exports every active setting, including built-in defaults. Useful for inspection or sharing a snapshot, but pins current defaults explicitly.

session-actions.command-placeholder: Optional bash command, leave empty for built-in behavior

errors.batch-write: Some settings could not be saved.
errors.sync-greeter: Could not sync appearance to Noctalia Greeter.

bar.label: Bar: {name}
bar.delete-confirm-desc: This GUI-created bar will be removed from settings.toml.

monitor-override.label: Monitor: {name}
monitor-override.delete-confirm-desc: This GUI-created monitor override will be removed from settings.toml.

lanes.empty-hint: Add a widget to populate this lane.

editor.title: Bar Widgets
editor.description: Arrange widgets across the bar lanes

settings.empty: No settings match the current filters.

raw.title: Raw Settings
raw.description: Unsupported keys preserved from this widget config.

picker.create-description: Choose a widget id for type "{type}"

instance.id-description: Use letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens only. No spaces; must be unique.
instance.delete-confirm-desc: This named widget will be removed from every bar and its settings discarded.

anchor.label: Anchor
anchor.description: Pin this widget as the center alignment anchor

capsule.label: Capsule
capsule.description: Draw a capsule behind this widget

capsule_border.label: Capsule Border
capsule_border.description: Color role for the capsule outline; fixed hex colors are also supported

capsule_fill.label: Capsule Fill
capsule_fill.description: Color role for the capsule background; fixed hex colors are also supported

capsule_foreground.label: Capsule Foreground
capsule_foreground.description: Color role for content inside the capsule; fixed hex colors are also supported

capsule_radius.label: Capsule Radius
capsule_radius.description: Corner radius for this widget capsule; leave blank for automatic pill shape, or set 0 for square corners
capsule_radius.taskbar-description: Corner radius for the widget capsule, workspace disc indicators, and workspace group capsules; leave blank for automatic pill shape, or set 0 for square corners
capsule_radius.workspaces-description: Corner radius for this widget capsule and workspace pills; leave blank for automatic pill shape, or set 0 for square corners

color.label: Color
color.description: Color role for widget foreground; fixed hex colors are also supported

scale.label: Scale
scale.description: Scale this widget relative to the bar content scale

font_weight.label: Font Weight
font_weight.description: Default inherits the bar font weight.

command.label: Left Click Command
command.description: Shell command run when left-clicking this button

custom_image.label: Custom image
custom_image.description: Path to a custom image. Leave empty to use the icon glyph.

cycle_command.label: Cycle Command
cycle_command.description: Command run when cycling keyboard layouts

display.label: Display
display.active-window-description: Icon, title, or both on horizontal bars. Vertical bars stay icon-only.

display_mode.label: Display Mode
display_mode.description: Render the battery as a graphical shape or a glyph icon

focused_color.label: Focused Color
focused_color.description: Color role used for the focused workspace; fixed hex colors are also supported

occupied_color.label: Occupied Color
occupied_color.description: Color role used for occupied workspaces; fixed hex colors are also supported

empty_color.label: Empty Color
empty_color.description: Color role used for empty workspaces; fixed hex colors are also supported

primary_click.label: Primary click
primary_click.description: Action performed when left-clicking the bar button

label.label: Label
label.description: Optional static text shown on this button

group_by_workspace.label: Group by Workspace
group_by_workspace.description: Group taskbar icons into workspace capsules when compositor data is available

show_all_outputs.label: Show All Monitors
show_all_outputs.description: Include windows from every display on this widget.

show_workspace_label.label: Workspace Capsule Label
show_workspace_label.description: Show the small workspace tag on grouped taskbar capsules. Turn off for icon-only groups.

workspace_label_placement.label: Workspace Label Placement
workspace_label_placement.description: Corner, centered on the edge, or inside the pill.

hide_empty_workspaces.label: Hide Empty Workspaces
hide_empty_workspaces.description: When grouping by workspace, omit capsules that have no running windows in the taskbar list.

workspace_group_capsule.label: Workspace Group Capsule
workspace_group_capsule.description: Draw the background and border around each grouped workspace. Turn off to keep icon grouping and workspace disc labels only.

group_single_icon_per_app.label: Single Icon per App
group_single_icon_per_app.description: When grouping by workspace, collapse multiple windows from the same app into one icon with a count badge.

show_window_title.label: Show Window Title
show_window_title.description: Show the window title next to its icon (only on horizontal bars)

window_title_max_width.label: Window Title Max Width
window_title_max_width.description: Maximum width in pixels for window titles

show_active_indicator.label: Active Window Indicator
show_active_indicator.description: Show a small dot below the active window icon in the taskbar.

active_opacity.label: Active Icon Opacity
active_opacity.description: Opacity of the icon for the active (focused) window.

inactive_opacity.label: Inactive Icon Opacity
inactive_opacity.description: Opacity of icons for inactive (unfocused) windows.

pinned.label: Pinned Items
pinned.description: Tray item ids that stay visible in the bar when drawer mode is enabled

match_adjacent_spacing.label: Match Adjacent Widget Spacing
match_adjacent_spacing.description: Widen gaps between inline tray icons to match the visual spacing of neighboring bar widgets (includes capsule padding)

drawer.label: Use Drawer Panel
drawer.description: Show a tray button in the bar and open items in a panel

drawer_columns.label: Drawer Columns
drawer_columns.description: Number of tray icons per row in the drawer panel

hide_when_off.label: Hide When Off
hide_when_off.description: Hide the lock key indicator when inactive

hide_when_no_unread.label: Hide When No New
hide_when_no_unread.description: Hide the notifications widget when there are no unread notifications

hide_when_plugged.label: Hide When Plugged In
hide_when_plugged.description: Hide the battery widget while connected to AC power

hide_when_full.label: Hide When Full
hide_when_full.description: Hide the battery widget when fully charged

hide_when_no_media.label: Hide When No Media
hide_when_no_media.description: Hide the media widget when no MPRIS player is active

hide_when_no_connected_device.label: Hide When No Connected Device
hide_when_no_connected_device.description: Hide the bluetooth widget when no device is connected

hide_when_empty.label: Hide When Empty
hide_when_empty.description: Hide workspace pills whne there are no open windows
hide_when_empty.workspaces-description: Hide workspace pills that have no open windows

labels_only_when_occupied.label: Labels Only When Occupied
labels_only_when_occupied.description: Hide workspace labels on empty workspaces
labels_only_when_occupied.workspaces-description: Show workspace id or name labels only on workspaces with open windows; empty tags stay unlabeled

hide_when_single_layout.label: Hide When Single Layout
hide_when_single_layout.description: Hide the keyboard layout widget unless more than one layout is configured

high_color.label: High Color
high_color.description: Color used for high visualizer values

label_min_width.label: Label Min Width
label_min_width.description: Minimum label width in pixels to prevent resizing

max_label_chars.label: Max Label Characters
max_label_chars.description: Maximum number of characters to show for workspace names
max_label_chars.workspaces-description: Maximum characters for workspace name labels

minimal.label: Minimal Style
minimal.description: Show workspace id or name labels only, without animated pills
minimal.workspaces-description: Text-only workspace labels without pill backgrounds or slide animation

pill_scale.label: Pill Scale
pill_scale.description: Adjust the scale of workspace pills
pill_scale.workspaces-description: Adjust the scale of workspace pills

hot_reload.label: Hot Reload
hot_reload.description: Reload the scripted widget when its source changes

low_color.label: Low Color
low_color.description: Color used for low visualizer values

middle_command.label: Middle Click Command
middle_command.description: Shell command run when middle-clicking this button. When set, middle-click opens this command instead of widget settings.

right_command.label: Right Click Command
right_command.description: Shell command run when right-clicking this button

scroll_down_command.label: Scroll Down Command
scroll_down_command.description: Shell command run when scrolling down over this button

scroll_up_command.label: Scroll Up Command
scroll_up_command.description: Shell command run when scrolling up over this button

title_scroll.label: Title Scroll
title_scroll.description: When the widget title should scroll

tooltip.label: Tooltip
tooltip.description: Tooltip shown when hovering this button

mirrored.label: Mirrored
mirrored.description: Mirror the visualizer around its center

centered.label: Centered
centered.description: Center visualizer bars instead of aligning them to the edge

scope.label: Runtime Scope
scope.description: Run one script runtime per live widget placement, or share one runtime across bars with the same widget id

show_when_idle.label: Show When Idle
show_when_idle.description: Keep the visualizer visible even when no media is playing

show_label.label: Show Label
show_label.description: Show text next to the icon

type.label: Type
type.description: Built-in widget type for this named widget

vertical_format.label: Vertical Format
vertical_format.description: Optional format used on vertical bars

warning_color.label: Warning Color
warning_color.description: Color applied when charge is at or below the warning threshold

warning_threshold.label: Warning Threshold
warning_threshold.description: Battery percentage at or below which the widget switches to warning color

theme-mode.label: Theme Mode
theme-mode.description: Choose dark, light, or auto based on time of day

palette-source.label: Palette Source
palette-source.description: Where to derive the color palette from

builtin-palette.label: Builtin Palette
builtin-palette.description: Choose a palette from the bundled catalog

wallpaper-generation-scheme.label: Wallpaper Generation Scheme
wallpaper-generation-scheme.description: Choose how wallpaper colors are converted into a palette

community-palette.label: Community Palette
community-palette.description: Choose a palette from the community catalog

ui-scale.label: UI Scale
ui-scale.description: Scale the entire interface up or down

corner-roundness.label: Corner Roundness
corner-roundness.description: Scale corner radius across shell UI containers and controls

font-family.label: Font Family
font-family.description: Font family for the shell interface

global-shadow-direction.description: Direction the shadow is cast from surfaces

enable-builtins.label: Enable Built-in Templates
enable-builtins.description: Use the bundled catalog of theme templates for apps

builtin-ids.label: Built-in Templates
builtin-ids.description: Toggle bundled app templates to render on each theme change

enable-community-templates.label: Enable Community Templates
enable-community-templates.description: Download and apply templates from the community catalog

community-ids.label: Community Templates
community-ids.description: Toggle cached community templates to render on each theme change
community-ids.empty: No community templates are available yet. Enable community templates and refresh the catalog first.

avatar-path.label: Avatar Path
avatar-path.description: Path to a custom avatar image

telemetry.label: Anonymous Startup Ping
telemetry.description: Sends a small anonymous startup ping with version, OS, compositor, monitor resolutions, RAM, and UI scale

niri-overview-type-to-launch.label: Type to Launch
niri-overview-type-to-launch.description: Open the launcher when typing in niri overview; uses a tiny keyboard-focus surface while overview is open

password-style.label: Password Style
password-style.description: Visual style for password input masking

sync-greeter.label: Noctalia Greeter
sync-greeter.description: Copy the current wallpaper and colors to Noctalia Greeter (requires administrator approval)
sync-greeter.success: Noctalia Greeter appearance synced. Changes apply on the next login screen.

middle-click-opens-widget-settings.label: Middle Click Opens Widget Settings
middle-click-opens-widget-settings.description: Open a bar widget's settings from the bar with middle click

time-format.label: Time Format
time-format.description: Default time format for shell UI without its own setting

date-format.label: Date Format
date-format.description: Default date format for shell UI without its own setting

show-location.label: Show Location
show-location.description: Show location name in weather widgets

launch-apps-as-systemd-services.label: Launch Apps as systemd Services
launch-apps-as-systemd-services.description: Launches applications in separate systemd services so they don't share Noctalia's cgroup

clipboard-enabled.label: Clipboard
clipboard-enabled.description: Enable clipboard history, the clipboard panel, and copy/paste integration

screen-time-enabled.label: Screen Time
screen-time-enabled.description: Track per-app usage and show it in Control Center

screenshot-save-to-file.label: Save to File
screenshot-save-to-file.description: Write screenshots as PNG files to the output directory

screenshot-directory.label: Output Directory
screenshot-directory.description: Folder for saved PNG files; leave empty to use ~/Pictures

screenshot-filename-pattern.label: Filename Pattern
screenshot-filename-pattern.description: strftime pattern without extension (.png is added); use %s for unix epoch

screenshot-copy-to-clipboard.label: Copy to Clipboard
screenshot-copy-to-clipboard.description: Place the captured PNG on the clipboard selection

screenshot-freeze-screen.label: Freeze Screen
screenshot-freeze-screen.description: Capture the desktop before region selection so moving content stays still

screenshot-pipe-to-command.label: Pipe to Command
screenshot-pipe-to-command.description: Send the captured PNG to a shell command on stdin

screenshot-pipe-command.label: Pipe Command
screenshot-pipe-command.description: Command run as /bin/sh -lc with the PNG on stdin; for annotators or uploaders (for example: swappy -f - or satty -f -)

clipboard-history-max-entries.label: History Size
clipboard-history-max-entries.description: Maximum unpinned entries kept in clipboard history

clipboard-confirm-clear-history.label: Confirm Clear History
clipboard-confirm-clear-history.description: Ask before clearing clipboard history or deleting an unpinned entry from the panel. When off, those actions apply immediately; pinned entries still ask before delete.

clipboard-image-action.label: Image Action Command
clipboard-image-action.description: Command to run from image clipboard entries; use {path} for the file path, {stdin} to mark the stdin position, or omit {path} to pipe automatically

osd-scale.label: Scale
osd-scale.description: Scale OSD popups relative to the shell UI scale (1.0 keeps the default size)

osd-offset-x.label: Horizontal Margin
osd-offset-x.description: Absolute horizontal margin from the screen edge

osd-offset-y.label: Vertical Margin
osd-offset-y.description: Absolute vertical margin from the screen edge

osd-lock-keys.label: Lock Keys
osd-lock-keys.description: Show OSD popups for Caps Lock, Num Lock, and Scroll Lock changes

osd-keyboard-layout.label: Keyboard Layout
osd-keyboard-layout.description: Show an OSD popup when the input keyboard layout changes

active-monitor-only.label: Active Monitor Only
active-monitor-only.description: Only show applications running on the active monitor

monitors.label: Monitors
monitors.description: Choose which monitors show the dock (leave empty for all); active-monitor filtering applies within these monitors

icon-size.label: Icon Size
icon-size.description: Size of dock icons in pixels

show-running.label: Show Running
show-running.description: Show running applications that are not pinned

show-dots.label: Show Dots
show-dots.description: Show running window dots beside dock icons

show-instance-count.label: Show Instance Count
show-instance-count.description: Show a badge with the number of open instances

launcher-position.label: Launcher Button
launcher-position.description: Show a launcher button at the start or end of the dock

launcher-icon.label: Launcher Icon
launcher-icon.description: Tabler icon shown on the dock launcher button

active-icon-scale.label: Active Icon Scale
active-icon-scale.description: Scale of the focused dock icon

active-icon-opacity.label: Active Icon Opacity
active-icon-opacity.description: Opacity of the focused dock icon

pinned-apps.label: Pinned Apps
pinned-apps.description: Desktop entry IDs of apps pinned to the dock

position.description: Which screen edge the dock sits on

ends-margin.description: Inset from each end of the dock along its main axis

edge-margin.description: Distance from the nearest screen edge; positive values float the dock away from it

corner-top-left.description: Top left corner radius for the dock

corner-top-right.description: Top right corner radius for the dock

corner-bottom-left.description: Bottom left corner radius for the dock

corner-bottom-right.description: Bottom right corner radius for the dock

shadow.description: Cast the global surface shadow from the dock

auto-hide.description: Automatically hide the dock when not in use

reserve-space.description: Reserve screen space for the dock

transparency-mode.label: Transparency
transparency-mode.description: Panel glass style, including floating/centered panel opacity and card translucency

borders.label: Borders
borders.description: Draw an outline on panels and section cards inside panels

shadow.description: Cast the global surface shadow from panel surfaces

home-shortcuts.label: Home Shortcuts
home-shortcuts.description: Choose up to six shortcut buttons for the home tab

placement-control-center.label: Placement
placement-control-center.description: Choose whether Control Center attaches to the bar, floats near it, or opens centered

control-center-sidebar.label: Sidebar
control-center-sidebar.description: Choose whether Control Center shows tab labels, icon-only tabs, or no sidebar

placement-launcher.label: Placement
placement-launcher.description: Choose whether the launcher attaches to the bar, floats near it, or opens centered

placement-clipboard.label: Placement
placement-clipboard.description: Choose whether the clipboard attaches to the bar, floats near it, or opens centered

placement-wallpaper.label: Placement
placement-wallpaper.description: Choose whether the wallpaper picker attaches to the bar, floats near it, or opens centered

placement-session.label: Placement
placement-session.description: Choose whether the session menu attaches to the bar, floats near it, or opens centered

open-near-click-control-center.label: Open Near Click
open-near-click-control-center.description: Position the Control Center panel near the bar click instead of centering it along the bar

open-near-click-launcher.label: Open Near Click
open-near-click-launcher.description: Position the launcher panel near the bar click instead of centering it along the bar

launcher-categories.label: Show Categories
launcher-categories.description: Display category filters in the launcher; toggle with Tab while the launcher is open

open-near-click-clipboard.label: Open Near Click
open-near-click-clipboard.description: Position the clipboard panel near the bar click instead of centering it along the bar

open-near-click-wallpaper.label: Open Near Click
open-near-click-wallpaper.description: Position the wallpaper picker panel near the bar click instead of centering it along the bar

open-near-click-session.label: Open Near Click
open-near-click-session.description: Position the session menu panel near the bar click instead of centering it along the bar

session-actions.label: Entries
session-actions.description: Power menu entries, order, custom commands, and icons

pre-action-fade.label: Idle Dim
pre-action-fade.description: Seconds of fullscreen dim before the idle command; use 0 to disable

behaviors.label: Behaviors
behaviors.description: Named idle actions with presets (lock, displays off, suspend) or custom commands, timeouts, resume pairing, and order

validate.label: Confirm
validate.description: Confirm selections, submit inputs, or activate the focused item

cancel.label: Cancel
cancel.description: Close popups, dismiss panels, or abort the current operation

left.label: Navigate left
left.description: Move focus or selection to the left

right.label: Navigate right
right.description: Move focus or selection to the right

up.label: Navigate up
up.description: Move focus or selection up one row

down.label: Navigate down
down.description: Move focus or selection down one row

widgets-editor.label: Widget Editor
widgets-editor.description: Add, move, and resize desktop widgets

screen-corners-enabled.label: Screen Corners
screen-corners-enabled.description: Round the screen corners with a black overlay

screen-corners-size.label: Corner Size
screen-corners-size.description: Radius of the rounded screen corners in pixels

fill-color.label: Fill Color
fill-color.description: Solid color shown behind image in uncovered areas

directory-light.label: Light Mode Directory
directory-light.description: Wallpaper folder used in light theme mode

directory-dark.label: Dark Mode Directory
directory-dark.description: Wallpaper folder used in dark theme mode

transitions.label: Transition Effects
transitions.description: Effects available when changing wallpaper (one is picked at random per change)

transition-duration.label: Transition Duration
transition-duration.description: Length of the wallpaper change animation in milliseconds

edge-smoothness.label: Edge Smoothness
edge-smoothness.description: Feathering of transition edges between wallpapers

automation.label: Automatic Rotation
automation.description: Cycle wallpapers automatically on a timer

per-monitor-directories.label: Per-Monitor Directories
per-monitor-directories.description: Use separate wallpaper folders for each monitor

monitor-directory-light.label: Light Mode Directory
monitor-directory-light.description: Wallpaper folder for this monitor in Light theme mode

monitor-directory-dark.label: Dark Mode Directory
monitor-directory-dark.description: Wallpaper folder for this monitor in Dark theme mode

calendar.label: Calendar
calendar.description: Show events from your online calendar accounts

calendar-refresh-interval.label: Refresh Interval
calendar-refresh-interval.description: How often to sync calendar events (minutes)

calendar-connect.label: Connect
calendar-connect.description: Authorize a Google account in your browser

system-monitor.label: System Monitor
system-monitor.description: Sample CPU, memory, network, load, temperature, and disk statistics

cpu-poll.label: CPU poll interval
cpu-poll.description: 1-120 seconds between CPU usage, CPU temperature, and load-average samples

gpu-poll.label: GPU poll interval
gpu-poll.description: 1-120 seconds between GPU temperature and VRAM samples

disk-poll.label: Disk poll interval
disk-poll.description: 1-120 seconds between disk usage and swap usage samples

weather-address.label: Address
weather-address.description: Manual location for weather (used when auto-locate is off)

weather-refresh-interval.label: Refresh Interval
weather-refresh-interval.description: How often to refresh weather data (minutes)

shell-sounds.label: Shell Sounds
shell-sounds.description: Play sound effects for shell events

volume-change-sound.label: Volume Change Sound
volume-change-sound.description: Sound file used for volume feedback

notification-sound.label: Notification Sound
notification-sound.description: Sound file used for notification feedback

mpris-blacklist.label: MPRIS Player Blacklist
mpris-blacklist.description: Players to ignore for media controls and Now Playing

ddcutil.label: DDC/CI (ddcutil)
ddcutil.description: Control external monitor brightness via DDC/CI
ddcutil.requires-ddcutil: Install ddcutil to enable DDC/CI brightness control

night-light.label: Night Light
night-light.description: Shift screen colors warmer at night
night-light.requires-gamma-control: Compositor does not support gamma control

force-night-light.label: Force Night Light
force-night-light.description: Always apply night light regardless of time

use-weather-location.label: Use Weather Location
use-weather-location.description: Use weather service location for sunrise/sunset instead of a manual schedule
use-weather-location.requires-weather-location: Enable weather auto-locate or set a weather address before relying on weather location

night-light-start-time.label: Start Time
night-light-start-time.description: Manual night light start time in HH:MM when weather location is off

night-light-stop-time.label: Stop Time
night-light-stop-time.description: Manual night light stop time in HH:MM when weather location is off

latitude.label: Latitude
latitude.description: Manual sunrise/sunset latitude when weather location is off and fixed times are unset

longitude.label: Longitude
longitude.description: Manual sunrise/sunset longitude when weather location is off and fixed times are unset

started.label: On Started
started.description: Command to run after Noctalia starts

wallpaper_changed.label: On Wallpaper Changed
wallpaper_changed.description: Command to run when the wallpaper changes

colors_changed.label: On Colors Changed
colors_changed.description: Command to run when the active color palette changes

theme_mode_changed.label: On Theme Mode Changed
theme_mode_changed.description: Command to run when the resolved theme mode changes between light and dark

session_locked.label: On Session Locked
session_locked.description: Command to run when the session is locked

session_unlocked.label: On Session Unlocked
session_unlocked.description: Command to run after the session is unlocked

logging_out.label: On Logout
logging_out.description: Command to run before logging out

wifi_enabled.label: On Wi-Fi Enabled
wifi_enabled.description: Command to run when Wi-Fi is enabled

wifi_disabled.label: On Wi-Fi Disabled
wifi_disabled.description: Command to run when Wi-Fi is disabled

bluetooth_enabled.label: On Bluetooth Enabled
bluetooth_enabled.description: Command to run when Bluetooth is enabled

bluetooth_disabled.label: On Bluetooth Disabled
bluetooth_disabled.description: Command to run when Bluetooth is disabled

battery_state_changed.label: On Battery State Changed
battery_state_changed.description: Command to run when charging state changes

battery_under_threshold.label: On Battery Under Threshold
battery_under_threshold.description: Command to run when battery percent drops under the configured threshold

power_profile_changed.label: On Power Profile Changed
power_profile_changed.description: Command to run when the active UPower/PPD power profile changes

battery-low-threshold.label: Battery Low Threshold
battery-low-threshold.description: Percent threshold for the low-battery hook (0 disables it)

scale.label: Size
scale.description: Scale notification toasts relative to the shell UI scale

layer.label: Wayland Layer
layer.description: Choose whether toasts use the top or overlay layer

offset-x.label: Horizontal Margin
offset-x.description: Absolute horizontal margin from the screen or bar edge

offset-y.label: Vertical Margin
offset-y.description: Absolute vertical margin from the screen or bar edge

monitors.label: Monitors
monitors.description: Choose which monitors show notification toasts; leave empty to show on all monitors

collapse-on-dismiss.label: Collapse on Dismiss
collapse-on-dismiss.description: Slide remaining toasts to close gaps when one is dismissed

font-weight.label: Font Weight
font-weight.description: Default weight for widget labels on this bar.

content-padding.label: Content Padding
content-padding.description: Padding inside the bar content area

widget-color.label: Widget Color
widget-color.description: Default icon and label color role for widgets on this bar; fixed hex colors are also supported

capsule-fill.label: Capsule Fill
capsule-fill.description: Default capsule background color role; fixed hex colors are also supported

capsule-border.label: Capsule Border
capsule-border.description: Default capsule outline color role; fixed hex colors are also supported

capsule-foreground.label: Capsule Foreground
capsule-foreground.description: Default icon and label color role inside capsules; fixed hex colors are also supported

capsule-radius.label: Capsule Radius
capsule-radius.description: Default corner radius for widget capsules, workspace pills, and taskbar workspace groups; leave blank for automatic pill shape, or set 0 for square corners

start-widgets.label: Start Widgets
start-widgets.description: Widgets on the start (left/top) side of the bar

center-widgets.label: Center Widgets
center-widgets.description: Widgets in the center of the bar

end-widgets.label: End Widgets
end-widgets.description: Widgets on the end (right/bottom) side of the bar

position.description: Which screen edge the bar sits on

auto-hide.description: Automatically hide the bar when not in use

reserve-space.description: Push windows away from the bar edge (only when auto-hide is off; auto-hide always overlays)

ends-margin.description: Inset from each end of the bar along its main axis

edge-margin.description: Distance from the nearest screen edge; positive values float the bar away from it

corner-top-left.description: Top left corner radius for the bar

corner-top-right.description: Top right corner radius for the bar

corner-bottom-left.description: Bottom left corner radius for the bar

corner-bottom-right.description: Bottom right corner radius for the bar

border.label: Border
border.description: Color role for the bar outline; fixed hex colors are also supported

border-width.label: Border Width
border-width.description: Inside outline width for the bar

shadow.description: Cast the global surface shadow from the bar

contact-shadow.description: Dark gradient between an attached panel and the bar to suggest depth at the seam

panel-overlap.label: Panel Overlap
panel-overlap.description: Pixels an attached panel overlaps the bar edge to hide the seam. Adjust if you see a line or gap.

file.empty-filtered: No files match the current filter
